---
title: "Resultat"
author: "Anders Nybakk"
code-fold: true
execute:
  warning: false  # Skjuler varselmeldinger
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
bibliography: resources/bib-final.bib
---
## Prestasjon

```{r}
#| label: fig-box-meanwatt
#| fig-cap: "Boksdiagram av gjennomsnittswatt per deltaker. Boks = median/IQR. Diamant og tynn tverrstrek = gjennomsnitt. Tall angir gjennomsnittswatt."
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4.5
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: hide

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

path <- file.path("Data", "Watt.xlsx")
if (!file.exists(path)) stop("Finner ikke Data/Watt.xlsx under render.")

w <- tryCatch(
  readxl::read_xlsx(path),
  error = function(e1) {
    if (requireNamespace("openxlsx", quietly = TRUE)) openxlsx::read.xlsx(path) else stop(e1)
  }
)

# Kolonne B = test
test_col_idx <- 2

# Kolonne F:AS = watt (6:45)
watt_cols_idx <- 6:min(45, ncol(w))

# Standardiser test (ASCII-trygt)
test_raw <- tolower(trimws(as.character(w[[test_col_idx]])))
test_std <- ifelse(grepl("^ap", test_raw), "Apne",
                   ifelse(grepl("^bik", test_raw), "Bikarbonat 2,5g/kg",
                          ifelse(grepl("^pla", test_raw), "Placebo", NA)))

# Watt → numerisk
watt_mat <- as.data.frame(w[, watt_cols_idx])
watt_mat[] <- lapply(watt_mat, function(x) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x)))

# Gjennomsnitt per deltaker
mean_per_subject <- data.frame(
  test = test_std,
  mean_watt = rowMeans(as.matrix(watt_mat), na.rm = TRUE)
) %>%
  filter(!is.na(test))

# Plot
ggplot(mean_per_subject, aes(x = test, y = mean_watt, color = test)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, linewidth = 0.8) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "crossbar", width = 0.5, linewidth = 0.6) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 18, size = 3) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "text",
    aes(label = sprintf("%.1f W", after_stat(y))),
    vjust = -0.8,
    size = 3.5,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.12, height = 0, alpha = 0.6) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Gjennomsnittswatt", color = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```


```{r}
#| label: fig-1-abc-vertical-xall
#| fig-cap: "Figur 1. Individ-linjer (stiplet, grå) og gjennomsnitt (heltrukket) for (a) Watt, (b) Hjertefrekvens (HF) og (c) Kadens (RPM) i Apné, Bikarbonat 2,5 g/kg og Placebo over 20 minutter."
#| fig-width: 7.5
#| fig-height: 9
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: hide

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(grid)   # <-- base R, alltid tilgjengelig

# ---- Fil ----
path <- file.path("data", "Data.xlsx")
if (!file.exists(path)) stop("Finner ikke data/Data.xlsx")

if (!requireNamespace("openxlsx", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("Installer 'openxlsx' (install.packages('openxlsx')).")
}

# ---- Excel kolonnebokstav -> indeks ----
col_to_index <- function(x) {
  x <- toupper(x)
  chars <- strsplit(x, "")[[1]]
  sum(match(chars, LETTERS) * 26^(rev(seq_along(chars)) - 1))
}

# ---- Les A:DV ----
dv <- col_to_index("DV")
df <- openxlsx::read.xlsx(path, cols = 1:dv)

# ---- Struktur ----
idx_id   <- 1L
rows_ap  <- 2:11
rows_bik <- 12:21
rows_pla <- 22:31

idx_watt <- col_to_index("G"):col_to_index("AT")
idx_hf   <- col_to_index("AU"):col_to_index("CH")
idx_rpm  <- col_to_index("CI"):col_to_index("DV")

stopifnot(length(idx_watt) == 40, length(idx_hf) == 40, length(idx_rpm) == 40)

time_min <- seq(0, 19.5, by = 0.5)

make_long <- function(idx, outcome) {
  m_ap  <- as.matrix(df[rows_ap,  idx])
  m_bik <- as.matrix(df[rows_bik, idx])
  m_pla <- as.matrix(df[rows_pla, idx])

  storage.mode(m_ap)  <- "numeric"
  storage.mode(m_bik) <- "numeric"
  storage.mode(m_pla) <- "numeric"

  to_long <- function(m, cond, ids) {
    data.frame(
      outcome = outcome,
      condition = cond,
      id = rep(ids, each = length(time_min)),
      time_min = rep(time_min, times = length(ids)),
      value = as.vector(t(m))
    )
  }

  bind_rows(
    to_long(m_ap,  "Apne",    df[rows_ap,  idx_id][[1]]),
    to_long(m_bik, "Bikarb",  df[rows_bik, idx_id][[1]]),
    to_long(m_pla, "Placebo", df[rows_pla, idx_id][[1]])
  )
}

dat <- bind_rows(
  make_long(idx_watt, "a  Watt"),
  make_long(idx_hf,   "b  HF"),
  make_long(idx_rpm,  "c  RPM")
) %>% filter(is.finite(value))

# ---- Etiketter ----
lab_apne <- paste0("Apn", "\u00E9")
lab_bik  <- "Bikarbonat 2,5 g/kg"
lab_pla  <- "Placebo"

dat <- dat %>%
  mutate(
    condition_lbl = recode(condition,
                           Apne = lab_apne,
                           Bikarb = lab_bik,
                           Placebo = lab_pla),
    outcome = factor(outcome, levels = c("a  Watt", "b  HF", "c  RPM"))
  )

mean_df <- dat %>%
  group_by(outcome, condition_lbl, time_min) %>%
  summarise(mean_value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# ---- Felles x-skala ----
x_scale <- scale_x_continuous(
  limits = c(0, 20),
  breaks = seq(0, 20, by = 5),
  name = "Tid (min)"
)

make_panel <- function(outcome_name, ylab_txt, show_legend = FALSE) {
  d <- dat %>% filter(outcome == outcome_name)
  m <- mean_df %>% filter(outcome == outcome_name)

  ggplot() +
    geom_line(
      data = d,
      aes(x = time_min, y = value, group = interaction(condition_lbl, id)),
      linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60",
      linewidth = 0.35, alpha = 0.4
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = m,
      aes(x = time_min, y = mean_value, color = condition_lbl),
      linewidth = 1.2
    ) +
    x_scale +
    labs(y = ylab_txt, color = NULL) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(legend.position = if (show_legend) "bottom" else "none")
}

pA <- make_panel("a  Watt", "Watt (W)", FALSE)
pB <- make_panel("b  HF",   "HF (bpm)", FALSE)
pC <- make_panel("c  RPM",  "RPM", TRUE)

# ---- Base R grid-layout: én samlet figur ----
grid.newpage()
pushViewport(viewport(layout = grid.layout(3, 1)))

print(pA, vp = viewport(layout.pos.row = 1, layout.pos.col = 1))
print(pB, vp = viewport(layout.pos.row = 2, layout.pos.col = 1))
print(pC, vp = viewport(layout.pos.row = 3, layout.pos.col = 1))
```






## Blodanalyse


### Laktat 

```{r}
#| label: fig-laktat-slope-panels
#| fig-cap: "Slopegraph for laktat: individuelle målinger og gjennomsnitt ved 10 min og post for Apné, Bikarbonat 2,5 g/kg og Placebo (separate paneler)."
#| fig-width: 7.2
#| fig-height: 4.8
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: hide

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

path <- file.path("data", "Data.xlsx")
if (!file.exists(path)) stop("Finner ikke data/Data.xlsx")

if (!requireNamespace("openxlsx", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("Installer 'openxlsx' (install.packages('openxlsx')).")
}

# Excel-kolonnebokstav -> indeks (AA, AB, ... DX)
col_to_index <- function(x) {
  x <- toupper(x)
  chars <- strsplit(x, "")[[1]]
  sum(match(chars, LETTERS) * 26^(rev(seq_along(chars)) - 1))
}

# Tving lesing minst til DX (så DW/DX alltid er med)
dx <- col_to_index("DX")
df <- openxlsx::read.xlsx(path, cols = 1:dx)
if (!is.data.frame(df)) stop("Kunne ikke lese Excel som tabell.")
if (ncol(df) < dx) stop("Innlesing ga færre kolonner enn DX. Sjekk at Data.xlsx har kolonner til DX.")

# Struktur iht. din beskrivelse
idx_id  <- 1L
rows_ap  <- 2:11
rows_bik <- 12:21
rows_pla <- 22:31

# Laktat-kolonner (eksakt)
col_10min <- col_to_index("DW")  # La.10min
col_post  <- col_to_index("DX")  # La.post

n <- nrow(df)

# Klipp rader hvis datasettet har færre rader enn forventet
clip_rows <- function(r) r[r >= 1 & r <= n]
rows_ap  <- clip_rows(rows_ap)
rows_bik <- clip_rows(rows_bik)
rows_pla <- clip_rows(rows_pla)

if (length(rows_ap) == 0 || length(rows_bik) == 0 || length(rows_pla) == 0) {
  stop("Radinndelingen (3–12, 13–22, 23–32) passer ikke til antall rader i arket.")
}

# Unicode-trygge etiketter
lab_apne <- paste0("Apn", "\u00E9")
lab_bik  <- "Bikarbonat 2,5 g/kg"
lab_pla  <- "Placebo"

make_block <- function(rows, protocol_lbl) {
  data.frame(
    id = as.character(df[rows, idx_id, drop = TRUE]),
    protocol_lbl = protocol_lbl,
    la_10min = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[rows, col_10min, drop = TRUE])),
    la_post  = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[rows, col_post,  drop = TRUE]))
  )
}

dat <- bind_rows(
  make_block(rows_ap,  lab_apne),
  make_block(rows_bik, lab_bik),
  make_block(rows_pla, lab_pla)
) %>%
  mutate(
    id = ifelse(is.na(id) | trimws(id) == "", as.character(row_number()), id),
    protocol_lbl = factor(protocol_lbl, levels = c(lab_apne, lab_bik, lab_pla))
  )

# Long-format (10 min og post)
long <- bind_rows(
  dat %>% transmute(id, protocol_lbl, time = "10 min", value = la_10min),
  dat %>% transmute(id, protocol_lbl, time = "Post",   value = la_post)
) %>%
  filter(is.finite(value)) %>%
  mutate(time = factor(time, levels = c("10 min", "Post")))

means <- long %>%
  group_by(protocol_lbl, time) %>%
  summarise(mean_value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Plot: tre paneler (ett per protokoll), individ (tynn) + mean (tykk)
ggplot() +
  geom_line(
    data = long,
    aes(x = time, y = value, group = id),
    linewidth = 0.6, alpha = 0.45
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = long,
    aes(x = time, y = value),
    size = 1.8, alpha = 0.45
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = means,
    aes(x = time, y = mean_value, group = 1),
    linewidth = 1.4
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = means,
    aes(x = time, y = mean_value),
    size = 3.2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ protocol_lbl, nrow = 1) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Laktat (mmol/L)") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```





### pH i blodet

```{r}
#| label: fig-ph-slope-panels
#| fig-cap: "Slopegraph for pH: individuelle målinger og gjennomsnitt ved baseline, pre, 10 min og post for Apné, Bikarbonat 2,5 g/kg og Placebo (separate paneler)."
#| fig-width: 7.8
#| fig-height: 4.8
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: hide

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# ---- Fil ----
path <- file.path("data", "Data.xlsx")
if (!file.exists(path)) stop("Finner ikke data/Data.xlsx")

if (!requireNamespace("openxlsx", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("Installer 'openxlsx' (install.packages('openxlsx')).")
}

# ---- Excel kolonnebokstav -> indeks ----
col_to_index <- function(x) {
  x <- toupper(x)
  chars <- strsplit(x, "")[[1]]
  sum(match(chars, LETTERS) * 26^(rev(seq_along(chars)) - 1))
}

# ---- Les arket helt til EB ----
eb <- col_to_index("EB")
df <- openxlsx::read.xlsx(path, cols = 1:eb)
if (!is.data.frame(df)) stop("Kunne ikke lese Excel som tabell.")

# ---- Riktig radinndeling (bekreftet tidligere) ----
idx_id   <- 1L
rows_ap  <- 2:11
rows_bik <- 12:21
rows_pla <- 22:31

n <- nrow(df)
clip_rows <- function(r) r[r >= 1 & r <= n]
rows_ap  <- clip_rows(rows_ap)
rows_bik <- clip_rows(rows_bik)
rows_pla <- clip_rows(rows_pla)

# ---- pH-kolonner (eksakt) ----
col_baseline <- col_to_index("DY")  # pH.baseline
col_pre      <- col_to_index("DZ")  # pH.pre
col_10min    <- col_to_index("EA")  # pH.10min
col_post     <- col_to_index("EB")  # pH.post

# ---- Etiketter ----
lab_apne <- paste0("Apn", "\u00E9")
lab_bik  <- "Bikarbonat 2,5 g/kg"
lab_pla  <- "Placebo"

make_block <- function(rows, protocol_lbl) {
  data.frame(
    id = as.character(df[rows, idx_id, drop = TRUE]),
    protocol_lbl = protocol_lbl,
    ph_baseline = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[rows, col_baseline, drop = TRUE])),
    ph_pre      = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[rows, col_pre,      drop = TRUE])),
    ph_10min    = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[rows, col_10min,    drop = TRUE])),
    ph_post     = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[rows, col_post,     drop = TRUE]))
  )
}

dat <- bind_rows(
  make_block(rows_ap,  lab_apne),
  make_block(rows_bik, lab_bik),
  make_block(rows_pla, lab_pla)
) %>%
  mutate(
    id = ifelse(is.na(id) | trimws(id) == "", as.character(row_number()), id),
    protocol_lbl = factor(protocol_lbl, levels = c(lab_apne, lab_bik, lab_pla))
  )

# ---- Long-format (4 tidspunkt) ----
long <- bind_rows(
  dat %>% transmute(id, protocol_lbl, time = "Baseline", value = ph_baseline),
  dat %>% transmute(id, protocol_lbl, time = "Pre",      value = ph_pre),
  dat %>% transmute(id, protocol_lbl, time = "10 min",   value = ph_10min),
  dat %>% transmute(id, protocol_lbl, time = "Post",     value = ph_post)
) %>%
  filter(is.finite(value)) %>%
  mutate(time = factor(time, levels = c("Baseline", "Pre", "10 min", "Post")))

# ---- Gjennomsnitt ----
means <- long %>%
  group_by(protocol_lbl, time) %>%
  summarise(mean_value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# ---- Plot ----
ggplot() +
  # Individlinjer
  geom_line(
    data = long,
    aes(x = time, y = value, group = id),
    linewidth = 0.6,
    alpha = 0.45
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = long,
    aes(x = time, y = value),
    size = 1.7,
    alpha = 0.45
  ) +
  # Gjennomsnitt
  geom_line(
    data = means,
    aes(x = time, y = mean_value, group = 1),
    linewidth = 1.4
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = means,
    aes(x = time, y = mean_value),
    size = 3.2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ protocol_lbl, nrow = 1) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "pH") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```



### Hb-konsentrasjon

```{r}
#| label: fig-hb-slope-panels
#| fig-cap: "Slopegraph for Hb-konsentrasjon: individuelle målinger og gjennomsnitt ved baseline, pre, 10 min og post for Apné, Bikarbonat 2,5 g/kg og Placebo (separate paneler)."
#| fig-width: 7.8
#| fig-height: 4.8
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: hide

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# ---- Fil ----
path <- file.path("data", "Data.xlsx")
if (!file.exists(path)) stop("Finner ikke data/Data.xlsx")

if (!requireNamespace("openxlsx", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("Installer 'openxlsx' (install.packages('openxlsx')).")
}

# ---- Excel kolonnebokstav -> indeks ----
col_to_index <- function(x) {
  x <- toupper(x)
  chars <- strsplit(x, "")[[1]]
  sum(match(chars, LETTERS) * 26^(rev(seq_along(chars)) - 1))
}

# ---- Les arket helt til EF ----
ef <- col_to_index("EF")
df <- openxlsx::read.xlsx(path, cols = 1:ef)
if (!is.data.frame(df)) stop("Kunne ikke lese Excel som tabell.")

# ---- Riktig radinndeling (bekreftet tidligere) ----
idx_id   <- 1L
rows_ap  <- 2:11
rows_bik <- 12:21
rows_pla <- 22:31

n <- nrow(df)
clip_rows <- function(r) r[r >= 1 & r <= n]
rows_ap  <- clip_rows(rows_ap)
rows_bik <- clip_rows(rows_bik)
rows_pla <- clip_rows(rows_pla)

# ---- Hb-kolonner (eksakt) ----
col_baseline <- col_to_index("EC")  # Hb.baseline
col_pre      <- col_to_index("ED")  # Hb.pre
col_10min    <- col_to_index("EE")  # Hb.10min
col_post     <- col_to_index("EF")  # Hb.post

# ---- Etiketter ----
lab_apne <- paste0("Apn", "\u00E9")
lab_bik  <- "Bikarbonat 2,5 g/kg"
lab_pla  <- "Placebo"

make_block <- function(rows, protocol_lbl) {
  data.frame(
    id = as.character(df[rows, idx_id, drop = TRUE]),
    protocol_lbl = protocol_lbl,
    hb_baseline = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[rows, col_baseline, drop = TRUE])),
    hb_pre      = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[rows, col_pre,      drop = TRUE])),
    hb_10min    = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[rows, col_10min,    drop = TRUE])),
    hb_post     = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[rows, col_post,     drop = TRUE]))
  )
}

dat <- bind_rows(
  make_block(rows_ap,  lab_apne),
  make_block(rows_bik, lab_bik),
  make_block(rows_pla, lab_pla)
) %>%
  mutate(
    id = ifelse(is.na(id) | trimws(id) == "", as.character(row_number()), id),
    protocol_lbl = factor(protocol_lbl, levels = c(lab_apne, lab_bik, lab_pla))
  )

# ---- Long-format (4 tidspunkt) ----
long <- bind_rows(
  dat %>% transmute(id, protocol_lbl, time = "Baseline", value = hb_baseline),
  dat %>% transmute(id, protocol_lbl, time = "Pre",      value = hb_pre),
  dat %>% transmute(id, protocol_lbl, time = "10 min",   value = hb_10min),
  dat %>% transmute(id, protocol_lbl, time = "Post",     value = hb_post)
) %>%
  filter(is.finite(value)) %>%
  mutate(time = factor(time, levels = c("Baseline", "Pre", "10 min", "Post")))

# ---- Gjennomsnitt ----
means <- long %>%
  group_by(protocol_lbl, time) %>%
  summarise(mean_value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# ---- Plot ----
ggplot() +
  geom_line(
    data = long,
    aes(x = time, y = value, group = id),
    linewidth = 0.6,
    alpha = 0.45
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = long,
    aes(x = time, y = value),
    size = 1.7,
    alpha = 0.45
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = means,
    aes(x = time, y = mean_value, group = 1),
    linewidth = 1.4
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = means,
    aes(x = time, y = mean_value),
    size = 3.2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ protocol_lbl, nrow = 1) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Hb-konsentrasjon") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```
